text:
The order book matches orders peer-to-peer — your order gets filled by another user's opposing order, not by a house. Orders are commonly matched by price first (best price gets priority), then by time (earlier orders ahead of later ones), but the exact tiebreaker rules are Novig's to confirm.

If you're seeing a specific order that didn't fill the way you expected, share the order ID and we can have our ops team walk through what happened with it.

Novig Support
